name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: TechStartup
entity_types.description: Technology startups focusing on AI and large models, like Moonshot AI.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The official full name of the startup.

entity_types.name: VentureCapitalist
entity_types.description: Investment firms or funds participating in financing rounds.

attributes.name: lead_investor
attributes.description: Whether this entity is the lead investor.

entity_types.name: CorporateStrategist
entity_types.description: Strategic investors from major tech giants or corporations.

attributes.name: company_name
attributes.description: Name of the strategic corporate investor.

attributes.name: strategic_interest
attributes.description: Area of strategic interest (e.g., API ecosystem).

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the individual investor.

attributes.name: background_role
attributes.description: Previous role or background (e.g., former executive).

entity_types.name: TechExecutive
entity_types.description: C-level executives and founders of technology companies.

attributes.name: company_affiliation
attributes.description: Name of the company they lead.

entity_types.name: TechJournalist
entity_types.description: Reporters and editors covering technology and business news.

attributes.name: media_outlet
attributes.description: Name of the media organization they work for.

attributes.name: beat_focus
attributes.description: Specific areas of coverage (e.g., AI, Cloud).

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organizations and platforms publishing reports.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Official name of the media outlet.

attributes.name: content_type
attributes.description: Type of content produced (e.g., Exclusive Report).

entity_types.name: CompetitorCompany
entity_types.description: Rival companies in the same industry sector.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Generic individual not fitting specific roles like execs or journalists.

attributes.name: role_description
attributes.description: Brief description of their role or identity.

attributes.name: public_visibility
attributes.description: Level of public visibility (e.g., anonymous source).

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Generic organization not fitting specific types like startups or media.

edge_types.name: LEADS_ROUND
edge_types.description: An investor leads a financing round for a startup.

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: An executive or journalist works for an organization.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: A journalist or media outlet reports on a company or event.

edge_types.name: INVESTED_IN
edge_types.description: An individual or entity has invested money in a startup.

attributes.name: cumulative_amount_usd
attributes.description: Total amount invested by this entity.

edge_types.name: COMPETES_WITH
edge_types.description: Two companies compete in the same market sector.

attributes.name: competition_area
attributes.description: Specific area of competition (e.g., Agent features).

edge_types.name: ANNOUNCES_STRATEGY
edge_types.description: An executive announces a new business strategy or plan.

attributes.name: announcement_channel
attributes.description: Channel used for announcement (e.g., internal letter).

attributes.name: strategy_focus
attributes.description: Key focus of the strategy (e.g., profitability).

edge_types.name: PARTICIPATES_IN_DISCUSSION
edge_types.description: Any entity participates in public or private discussions about the topic.

attributes.name: sentiment_tone
attributes.description: Tone of the discussion (e.g., optimistic, critical).

analysis_summary: 文本主要围绕月之暗面（Kimi）完成5亿美元C轮融资展开，涉及融资方（IDG、阿里、腾讯、王慧文）、被投企业（月之暗面）、竞争对手（智谱、MiniMax）、高管（杨植麟、张予彤）以及报道媒体（晚点LatePost）。舆论模拟需关注资本叙事从估值转向商业化（付费留存、API收入）、技术路线（Agent、算力成本）及生态位竞争。实体设计覆盖了投资方、创业公司、高管、记者及竞品，关系类型涵盖投资、任职、报道、竞争及战略发布，能够完整还原舆论场中的多方互动与观点分化。
simulation_requirement: 若不新一轮融资的前提下，公司把重心从「拉新增长」切到付费留存与 B 端/API，中文互联网讨论会从「估值故事」转向哪些新框架（产品力、合规、算力成本、与巨头的生态位）？自媒体与投资人的话术会如何分化？
